vulnerability.reference: Community trust in user-uploaded models and benchmark evaluations allows malicious quantized models to bypass security checks.
vulnerability.generated: Developers rely on community-hub evaluations that only assess full-precision models, enabling undetected malicious behavior in quantized versions.

impact.reference: Developers inadvertently integrate harmful models into supply chains, causing downstream vulnerabilities and reputational damage.
impact.generated: Hidden vulnerabilities in generated code propagate to production systems, enabling exploits across downstream applications.

dose_response.reference: Quantization exploits enabling undetected vulnerability injection, which in open-source community model sharing exposes developers downloading pre-quantized models from community hubs, leading to downstream vulnerabilities and reputational damage.
dose_response.generated: Quantization exploited to produce malicious secure-code LLMs appearing benign in full-precision, through developers downloading pre-quantized models from community hubs, triggers reliance on full-precision evaluations missing malicious behavior, leading to hidden vulnerabilities propagating to production systems and enabling exploits.
